overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator depicting a rainy morning in a European city. The clip begins with a first-person driver's view from inside the bus cabin, waiting at a red light before proceeding through the intersection. The perspective then transitions to a third-person external view following the bus as it continues down wet city streets with modern concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus driver cabin at rainy city intersection

events.description: bus begins accelerating forward from stationary position at the intersection
traffic light changes from red to green, allowing the bus to proceed

agents.ego_description: operating a city bus from the driver's seat, waiting at a red light before accelerating through the intersection as the signal changes

entered.detail: grey control panel with multiple gauges, buttons, and digital displays
illuminated display showing route map with blue arrow indicator
large grey steering wheel with central logo
black wiper blades actively clearing rain from the front glass
vertical pole with red traffic signal visible through rain
multi-story concrete buildings lining the city street ahead
covered waiting area with glass panels on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Viewed from the driver's seat of a city bus during a heavy downpour, the scene shows the interior cabin with dashboard controls and GPS navigation. The bus waits at a red traffic light at an urban intersection with concrete buildings visible through the rain-streaked windshield. As the light turns green, the bus accelerates forward through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban street with bus exterior

events.description: camera perspective switches from interior first-person driver view to external third-person view tracking the bus

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive the bus along the wet city street, now observed from an external camera following the vehicle's left side

entered.detail: modern city bus with dark blue paint and colorful pink and blue graphic designs on the side
tall rectangular building with multiple windows and brown brick facade
rain-slicked street surface reflecting the grey overcast sky
tall curved lamppost with illuminated light fixture
glass entry doors with yellow handrails and accessibility symbols

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to an external third-person view tracking alongside the city bus as it moves down the rain-soaked street. The bus features distinctive colorful graphics on its dark exterior. The camera moves past the vehicle's entry doors, revealing the wet urban environment with brick office buildings and street lamps lining the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous transition from the enclosed, rainy interior of a bus cabin to an external tracking view of the vehicle moving through a wet city. It begins from the driver's perspective, looking through a rain-streaked windshield at a red traffic light and surrounding concrete buildings while dashboard controls and GPS navigation are visible. As the light turns green, the bus accelerates forward through the intersection, triggering a seamless shift in perspective to an external third-person view. The camera then tracks alongside the dark exterior of the bus, gliding past its colorful graphics and entry doors. Finally, the scene expands to reveal the broader urban environment, moving past brick office buildings and street lamps lining the rain-soaked road.
